---
title: "Data Lab"
format: html
---

Interactive tools for analysing labour market indicators, social economy trends, and occupational accident statistics.

::: {=html}
<div class="tool-grid">

  <div class="tool-card">
    <h3>Labour Market Data</h3>
    <p>Interactive tools for labour force participation, employment, and unemployment indicators.</p>
    <a class="tool-link" href="./labour-market.html">Open Tool</a>
  </div>

  <div class="tool-card">
    <h3>Social Economy Data</h3>
    <p>Interactive visualisations for cooperatives, social enterprises, and ecosystem indicators.</p>
    <a class="tool-link" href="./social-economy.html">Open Tool</a>
  </div>

  <div class="tool-card">
    <h3>Occupational Accident Data</h3>
    <p>Dynamic tools for accident trends, sectoral comparisons, and safety indicators.</p>
    <a class="tool-link" href="./occupational-accidents.html">Open Tool</a>
  </div>

</div>
:::
